notes: Dataset uses the final single extract_workflow_intent tool contract.
Batches 001-005 accepted examples were promoted to train/validation after validator cleanup.
Golden test examples are promoted only to test.jsonl.
Golden test repair 002 added valid multi_step and financial_answer coverage to the locked test split.
Rejected incoming examples remain archived under incoming_rejected and incoming_test_rejected for prompt improvement.
The locked test set should now change only through explicit accepted golden-test additions or schema migrations.
